Automated Morning RoutineWake up to your Coffee already brewed via Time ScheduleThe Coffee System triggers your connected Lamp in your Room to turn on In A Hurry?  No Problem, leave both appliances on because they will automatically both turn off via time schedule as well Eliminate the potential stress and automate your existing morning routine now! Connect WeMo Switch 1 to Coffee Pot Maker or Keurig System, and keep it in standby mode Manually prepare your batch of coffee or Keurig cup the night before Within the WeMo Application, set your WeMo Switch to Turn On Via Time Schedule by your specification For Example: If your alarm goes off at 5:00 AM, set your WeMo Switch to Turn On At 5:00 AM so it will begin to brew at the same time your Alarm goes off.Connect WeMo Switch 2 to your Room's Brightest Plug In Lamp.
